description_long: This is a large, ornately decorated wooden Viking longship with a dragon-headed prow and a curved stern. The hull is dark brown and features a series of round, colorful shields attached along the sides, each with unique patterns. A single tall mast supports a large, rectangular white sail, and the ship is equipped with multiple long oars extending from both sides. Ropes are rigged from the mast to the bow and stern, providing structural support. The deck is open, with visible benches for rowers and a central area for standing or storing cargo. The overall design is both functional for water travel and visually striking, evoking historical Norse craftsmanship.
description: A large, dark wooden Viking longship with a dragon head prow, white sail, colorful shields, and multiple oars. The ship is open-decked and richly detailed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dragon head prow, the full width of the white sail, and the symmetrical arrangement of oars.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dragon head, curved stern, colorful shields, and the full length of the oars and sail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stern's curve, the back of the sail, and the oars extending outward.
description_view_3: Right side view with a clear look at the shields, oars, and the dragon head and tail details.
